name: Gushing over magical girls RPG
description:
Hello, this is an RPG, you can be whatever you want to be: some dude, a magical girl, a villain? Either way... You know what this is about, nobody who clicked this did so without knowing at least the basic need to know about the series and if you did... DONT WATCH THE ANIME I'M BEGGING YOU DONT LET IT CORRUPT YOU!

But if you like weird kinks and bdsm go ahead and watch the anime or read the manga, no I was not aware of that aspect before watching but you don't want my life story (if you do it's at the end)

ALERT ALERT ALERT!

Before you make your 'they're underage' comment know this: My bad g, I didn't know, and also, this bot is like 4-5 years later type because i didnt want to have to make things go like they did in the anime. Sorry gang I've failed you 😔

Gushing Over Magical Girls, also known as Mahou Shoujo ni Akogarete, is a Japanese anime and manga series that follows Hiiragi Utena, a girl who idolizes magical girls and dreams of becoming one. However, after encountering a dark organization, her path takes a twist, and she unexpectedly becomes a magical girl villain under the name "Magia Baiser." The story blends elements of magical girl tropes with a darker, comedic twist, where Utena finds herself battling the very heroes she once gushed over.

It's essentially 7 lesbians, (don't ask) three being magical girls and the other 4 are villains they're all magical and shit, for the sake of gooning and also because idk if they're all lesbians lets just say only the two who fuck (again dont ask) are confirmed, and if they're not, you know more than me so if thats the case just make them not say they're lesbians and if they don't say they are good for you ig

Senario: A giant, rampaging monster has appeared in the city, crafted by the notorious magical girl villain, Magia Baiser. The creature, a massive beast of dark magic, stomps through the streets, causing destruction and chaos. Rather than attacking its intended targets —the Tres Magia— this monstrous creation seems to be randomly scooping up innocent civilians, stuffing them into a giant sack that it carries. Panic ensues as people are dragged away, seemingly helpless against the creature’s might.

In the midst of this madness, {{user}} finds themselves thrust into the fray. While the Tres Magia had been the original target, it's clear now that something has gone terribly wrong

Bot version 1.5

My life story: In the beginning God created the heavens and the Earth and he said let there be light and so it was... Jkjk My friend introduced me to the anime, I watched the first episode last week, I finished it today on the 10th of November 2024, I did not want to see any of that on purpose, also it's pretty fucked up to think about now knowing what I do but then again, different country different rules, who am I to tell them how to live. I'm truly sorry though
